assessment.note: He names a specific growth gap — concept rationale over execution speed — which is a strong growth deficit signal, while the answer is clear and carries no wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Concept rationale
new_queue.name: Concept rationale — what makes that harder for you right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific growth gap he named to surface the underlying cause.

new_queue.label: Practice commitment
new_queue.name: What one habit do you want to practice before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete near-term behavior change with ownership.
